# Vježba 1 — Uvod u mehaniku fluida

Pascalov zakon i Newtonov zakon viskoznosti uvode prijenos tlaka i unutarnje trenje kao dvije temeljne ideje mehanike fluida.

### Teorijski uvod

Mehanika fluida proučava ponašanje tekućina i plinova. Za razliku od krutih tijela, fluidi su tvari koje nemaju stalan oblik i neprestano se deformiraju pod utjecajem i najmanjeg tangencijalnog naprezanja. Ova vježba obrađuje dva temeljna stupa mehanike fluida:

1. **Pascalov zakon:** Tlak narinut u bilo kojoj točki zatvorenog, nestlačivog fluida prenosi se nepromijenjen u svim smjerovima. To je temelj rada hidrauličkih strojeva.
2. **Newtonov zakon viskoznosti:** Definira unutarnje trenje u fluidu. Tangencijalno naprezanje $\tau$ proporcionalno je gradijentu brzine, a faktor proporcionalnosti je dinamička viskoznost $\mu$.

Ispod možete interaktivno istražiti oba principa.

````{=html}
<div id="v1-intro-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fbff 0%, #ffffff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Konceptualni laboratorij</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.45rem;">Pascalov tlak i Newtonovo smično naprezanje</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">Promijeni ulaznu silu, omjer površina, brzinu pomične ploče i viskoznost, pa prati kako se isti fizikalni zakon odmah pretvara u novu sliku tlaka, profil brzine i smično naprezanje.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px;">
            <button type="button" id="btn-pascal" style="padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #2563eb; color: white; font-weight: 700; transition: 0.2s;">Pascalov zakon</button>
            <button type="button" id="btn-newton" style="padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #e2e8f0; color: #475569; font-weight: 700; transition: 0.2s;">Newtonov zakon</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 18px;">
        <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v1-intro-canvas" width="520" height="360" style="display: block; width: 100%; height: auto;"></canvas>
            <div id="v1-scene-caption" style="position: absolute; left: 16px; right: 16px; bottom: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; color: #334155; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.45;"></div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; width: 100%;">
            <div id="v1-pascal-panel" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px;">
                <div style="padding: 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 16px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #1d4ed8; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px;">Ulazi sustava</div>
                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Ulazna sila F₁: <span id="v1-pascal-force-val" style="color: #2563eb;">120</span> N</label>
                    <input id="v1-pascal-force" type="range" min="40" max="240" step="10" value="120" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px; accent-color: #2563eb;">

                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Omjer površina A₂ / A₁: <span id="v1-pascal-ratio-val" style="color: #2563eb;">4.0</span></label>
                    <input id="v1-pascal-ratio" type="range" min="1.5" max="8" step="0.1" value="4" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Tlak u ulju</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="v1-pascal-pressure">1.00</span> MPa</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Izlazna sila F₂</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f766e;"><span id="v1-pascal-output">480</span> N</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                    <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                    <p id="v1-pascal-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.5;"></p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div id="v1-newton-panel" style="display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px;">
                <div style="padding: 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 16px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #c2410c; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px;">Ulazi sustava</div>
                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Brzina gornje ploče: <span id="v1-newton-speed-val" style="color: #ea580c;">1.20</span> m/s</label>
                    <input id="v1-newton-speed" type="range" min="0.2" max="2.4" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px; accent-color: #ea580c;">

                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Dinamička viskoznost μ: <span id="v1-newton-mu-val" style="color: #ea580c;">0.35</span> Pa·s</label>
                    <input id="v1-newton-mu" type="range" min="0.05" max="1.2" step="0.05" value="0.35" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ea580c;">
                </div>

                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Gradijent brzine dv/dy</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c2410c;"><span id="v1-newton-gradient">48.0</span> s⁻¹</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Smično naprezanje τ</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #9a3412;"><span id="v1-newton-tau">16.8</span> Pa</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                    <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                    <p id="v1-newton-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.5;"></p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v1-intro-canvas');
    if (!canvas) return;

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const state = {
        tab: 'pascal',
        pascalForce: 120,
        pascalRatio: 4,
        newtonSpeed: 1.2,
        newtonMu: 0.35,
        frame: 0
    };

    const controls = {
        pascalForce: document.getElementById('v1-pascal-force'),
        pascalRatio: document.getElementById('v1-pascal-ratio'),
        newtonSpeed: document.getElementById('v1-newton-speed'),
        newtonMu: document.getElementById('v1-newton-mu')
    };

    const panels = {
        pascal: document.getElementById('v1-pascal-panel'),
        newton: document.getElementById('v1-newton-panel')
    };

    const buttons = {
        pascal: document.getElementById('btn-pascal'),
        newton: document.getElementById('btn-newton')
    };

    const caption = document.getElementById('v1-scene-caption');
    const pascalAreaCm2 = 12;
    const gapMeters = 0.025;

    function setTab(tab) {
        state.tab = tab;
        buttons.pascal.style.background = tab === 'pascal' ? '#2563eb' : '#e2e8f0';
        buttons.pascal.style.color = tab === 'pascal' ? '#ffffff' : '#475569';
        buttons.newton.style.background = tab === 'newton' ? '#ea580c' : '#e2e8f0';
        buttons.newton.style.color = tab === 'newton' ? '#ffffff' : '#475569';
        panels.pascal.style.display = tab === 'pascal' ? 'flex' : 'none';
        panels.newton.style.display = tab === 'newton' ? 'flex' : 'none';
        updateMetrics();
    }

    function updateMetrics() {
        state.pascalForce = parseFloat(controls.pascalForce.value);
        state.pascalRatio = parseFloat(controls.pascalRatio.value);
        state.newtonSpeed = parseFloat(controls.newtonSpeed.value);
        state.newtonMu = parseFloat(controls.newtonMu.value);

        const area1 = pascalAreaCm2 / 10000;
        const pressure = state.pascalForce / area1;
        const force2 = state.pascalForce * state.pascalRatio;

        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-force-val').textContent = state.pascalForce.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-ratio-val').textContent = state.pascalRatio.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-pressure').textContent = (pressure / 1e6).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-output').textContent = force2.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-explainer').textContent = `Isti tlak prolazi kroz cijelu zatvorenu tekućinu, pa povećanje omjera površina s ${state.pascalRatio.toFixed(1)} odmah diže izlaznu silu na ${force2.toFixed(0)} N. Ne množi se tlak, nego površina na koju taj tlak djeluje.`;

        const gradient = state.newtonSpeed / gapMeters;
        const tau = state.newtonMu * gradient;

        document.getElementById('v1-newton-speed-val').textContent = state.newtonSpeed.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-mu-val').textContent = state.newtonMu.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-gradient').textContent = gradient.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-tau').textContent = tau.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-explainer').textContent = `Kad gornju ploču ubrzaš na ${state.newtonSpeed.toFixed(2)} m/s, gradijent brzine raste na ${gradient.toFixed(1)} s⁻¹. Ako istodobno raste i μ = ${state.newtonMu.toFixed(2)} Pa·s, slojevi se teže kližu i smično naprezanje skače na ${tau.toFixed(1)} Pa.`;

        caption.innerHTML = state.tab === 'pascal'
            ? `Svaka plava točka prikazuje isti prijenos tlaka kroz ulje. Pritisni manji klip: tlak ostaje isti, ali na većoj površini proizvodi veću silu <strong>F₂</strong>.`
            : `Boja i duljina strelica pokazuju kako brzina raste s udaljenošću od nepomične stijenke. Crvena skala desno prikazuje da veći $\mu$ ili veći $dv/dy$ znače veće smično naprezanje.`;
    }

    function drawPascal() {
        const force = state.pascalForce;
        const ratio = state.pascalRatio;
        const pressure = force / (pascalAreaCm2 / 10000);
        const force2 = force * ratio;
        const pulse = (Math.sin(state.frame * 0.06) + 1) / 2;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fbff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const leftX = 88;
        const rightX = 382;
        const baseY = 300;
        const chamberTop = 98;
        const pipeY = 242;
        const leftWidth = 52;
        const rightWidth = 52 + ratio * 12;
        const smallDisp = 10 + pulse * 10;
        const largeDisp = smallDisp / Math.max(ratio, 1.5);
        const fluidAlpha = 0.22 + Math.min(pressure / 2.4e6, 1) * 0.4;

        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, chamberTop, 0, baseY + 24);
        grad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(56, 189, 248, ${fluidAlpha})`);
        grad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(29, 78, 216, ${fluidAlpha + 0.12})`);
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(leftX - leftWidth / 2, chamberTop + 20);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX - leftWidth / 2, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX + rightWidth / 2, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX + rightWidth / 2, chamberTop - 10);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX - rightWidth / 2, chamberTop - 10);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX - rightWidth / 2, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX + leftWidth / 2, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX + leftWidth / 2, chamberTop + 20);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.stroke();

        for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
            const px = 118 + (i % 6) * 58 + (i > 5 ? 18 : 0);
            const py = 148 + Math.floor(i / 6) * 70;
            const radius = 5 + pulse * 2;
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.24 + pulse * 0.2})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.fillRect(leftX - leftWidth / 2 + 4, chamberTop + 78 + smallDisp, leftWidth - 8, 14);
        ctx.fillRect(rightX - rightWidth / 2 + 4, chamberTop + 42 - largeDisp, rightWidth - 8, 14);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.fillRect(rightX - 36, chamberTop - 58 - largeDisp, 72, 48);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText(`${force2.toFixed(0)} N`, rightX, chamberTop - 29 - largeDisp);

        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillText(`A₁ = ${pascalAreaCm2.toFixed(0)} cm²`, leftX - 34, baseY + 30);
        ctx.fillText(`A₂ = ${(pascalAreaCm2 * ratio).toFixed(0)} cm²`, rightX - 34, baseY + 30);
        ctx.fillText(`p = ${(pressure / 1e6).toFixed(2)} MPa`, 18, 26);

        drawArrow(leftX, chamberTop + 24, leftX, chamberTop + 70 + smallDisp, '#2563eb', 'F₁');
        drawArrow(rightX, chamberTop + 58 - largeDisp, rightX, chamberTop - 22 - largeDisp, '#0f766e', 'F₂');

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(208, 82);
        ctx.lineTo(208, 314);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.fillText('isti tlak u zatvorenom ulju', 224, 90);
    }

    function drawNewton() {
        const speed = state.newtonSpeed;
        const mu = state.newtonMu;
        const gradient = speed / gapMeters;
        const tau = mu * gradient;
        const pulse = (Math.sin(state.frame * 0.05) + 1) / 2;
        const left = 68;
        const top = 82;
        const width = 320;
        const height = 190;
        const layers = 7;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#fffaf5';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(left, top, left, top + height);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.24)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.08)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(left, top, width, height);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1f2937';
        ctx.fillRect(left, top - 20, width, 18);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillRect(left, top + height, width, 16);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#9a3412';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText(`gornja ploča: ${speed.toFixed(2)} m/s`, left + 8, top - 30);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillText('donja ploča: v = 0', left + 8, top + height + 34);

        for (let i = 0; i <= layers; i++) {
            const t = i / layers;
            const y = top + height - t * height;
            const localSpeed = t * speed;
            const arrowLen = 34 + localSpeed * 70;
            const hue = 205 - t * 42;
            ctx.strokeStyle = `hsl(${hue}, 78%, 48%)`;
            ctx.lineWidth = 2 + t * 2.2;
            drawArrow(left + 30, y, left + 30 + arrowLen, y, ctx.strokeStyle, i === layers ? 'vmax' : '');
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.font = '11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`${localSpeed.toFixed(2)} m/s`, left + 44 + arrowLen, y + 4);
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            const row = i % 6;
            const col = Math.floor(i / 6);
            const y = top + 20 + row * 28;
            const localT = 1 - ((y - top) / height);
            const particleSpeed = 0.8 + localT * speed * 2.4;
            const x = left + 14 + ((col * 58 + state.frame * particleSpeed * 2) % (width - 28));
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(249, 115, 22, ${0.22 + localT * 0.4})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        const barX = 430;
        const barTop = 94;
        const barHeight = 176;
        const stressRatio = Math.min(tau / 55, 1);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fee2e2';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, 42, barHeight);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop + (1 - stressRatio) * barHeight, 42, stressRatio * barHeight);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fecaca';
        ctx.strokeRect(barX, barTop, 42, barHeight);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#7f1d1d';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('τ', barX + 15, barTop - 8);
        ctx.fillText(`${tau.toFixed(1)} Pa`, barX - 6, barTop + barHeight + 18);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fb923c';
        ctx.setLineDash([7, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(left + 18, top + height + 2);
        ctx.lineTo(left + 18 + 190, top + height - 160);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#9a3412';
        ctx.fillText(`dv/dy = ${gradient.toFixed(1)} s⁻¹`, left + 208, top + 24);
        ctx.fillText(`μ = ${mu.toFixed(2)} Pa·s`, left + 208, top + 44);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#b91c1c';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        drawArrow(barX - 18, top - 10 - pulse * 3, barX - 18, top + 24 + pulse * 5, '#b91c1c', 'τ');
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = Math.max(ctx.lineWidth || 2, 2);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x2 + (x2 >= x1 ? 8 : -28), y2 - 6);
        }
    }

    function animate() {
        state.frame += 1;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        if (state.tab === 'pascal') drawPascal();
        else drawNewton();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    buttons.pascal.addEventListener('click', () => setTab('pascal'));
    buttons.newton.addEventListener('click', () => setTab('newton'));
    Object.values(controls).forEach((input) => input.addEventListener('input', updateMetrics));

    updateMetrics();
    setTab('pascal');
    animate();
})();
</script>
````

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Pascalov zakon primjenjujte kada je fluid u mirovanju i traži se prijenos tlaka ili sile kroz zatvoreni sustav.</li>
            <li>Newtonov zakon viskoznosti primjenjujte kada postoji gradijent brzine i treba povezati tangencijalno naprezanje s deformacijom strujanja.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Nemoj miješati tlak i silu: tlak se kroz fluid prenosi jednak, ali sila uvijek ovisi o površini na koju taj tlak djeluje.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z1 — Ručna hidraulična dizalica {.unnumbered}

Ručna hidraulična dizalica na slici napunjena je uljem. Ukoliko zanemarimo težinu klipova i preostalih elemenata, te mehaničke gubitke, potrebno je odrediti silu $F$ koja će održavati sustav u ravnoteži kada teret ima masu $m = 1000 \, \text{kg}$. Pretpostaviti konstantan tlak u čitavoj komori. Promjer većeg klipa $d_v = 100 \, \text{mm}$, a manjeg $d_m = 30 \, \text{mm}$. Sila $F$ djeluje na manji klip na kraku $b = 400 \, \text{mm}$ i oslonjena je u osloncu A (duljina $a = 30 \, \text{mm}$) kako je prikazano na slici.

**Zadano:** $m = 1000 \, \text{kg}$, $d_v = 0{,}1 \, \text{m}$, $d_m = 0{,}03 \, \text{m}$, $a = 0{,}03 \, \text{m}$, $b = 0{,}4 \, \text{m}$  
**Odrediti:** Sila na ručki $F$

**Rješenje:**

Površina kojom veći $d_v$ i manji $d_m$ klip djeluju na fluid:
$$A_v = d_v^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 0,00785 \, \text{m}^2$$
$$A_m = d_m^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 7,0686 \cdot e^{-4} \, \text{m}^2$$

Sila koja djeluje na veliki klip iznosi:
$$F_v = m \cdot g = 1000 \cdot 9,81 = 9810 \, \text{N}$$

Tlak na oba klipa je jednak:
$$p = \frac{F_v}{A_v} = \frac{9810}{0,00785} = \frac{F_m}{A_m} = 1.249.048 \, \text{Pa} = 1,25 \, \text{MPa}$$

Sila na manjem klipu sada je:
$$F_m = p \cdot A_m = 1.249.048 \cdot 7,0686 \cdot e^{-4} = 883 \, \text{N}$$

Za ručku vrijedi:
$$\sum M_A = 0 = -(b + a) \cdot F + a \cdot F_m \implies F = a \cdot \frac{F_m}{b + a} = \mathbf{61,6 \, \text{N}}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z1-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; padding: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Z1 laboratorij sile</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.42rem;">Ručna hidraulična dizalica: tlak pa poluga</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">Student ovdje treba vidjeti dva koraka: teret prvo stvara tlak u ulju, a tek onda poluga pretvara silu na malom klipu u silu ruke. Zato su oba pojačanja prikazana odvojeno.</p>
        </div>
        <button id="z1-press-btn" type="button" style="padding: 11px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #0f766e); color: white; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2);">Pokreni slijed sile</button>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 18px;">
        <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z1-canvas" width="560" height="390" style="display: block; width: 100%; height: auto;"></canvas>
            <div id="z1-pressure-overlay" style="position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 12px; color: #334155;">
                Tlak u ulju: <span id="z1-res-p" style="font-weight: 800; color: #2563eb;">1.25</span> MPa
            </div>
            <div style="position: absolute; right: 12px; top: 12px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9); color: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 0.73rem; line-height: 1.45; max-width: 170px;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #93c5fd; margin-bottom: 4px;">Lanac uzroka</div>
                <div>1. Teret stvara <strong>Fv</strong></div>
                <div>2. Ulje prenosi isti <strong>p</strong></div>
                <div>3. Mali klip osjeća <strong>Fm</strong></div>
                <div>4. Poluga smanjuje potrebnu silu <strong>F</strong></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem; width: 100%;">
            <div style="padding: 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Masa tereta: <span id="z1-v-m" style="color: #166534;">1000</span> kg</label>
                <input type="range" id="z1-m" min="500" max="3000" step="100" value="1000" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #16a34a; margin-bottom: 12px;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Omjer promjera klipova dᵥ / dₘ: <span id="z1-v-ratio" style="color: #2563eb;">3.3</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="z1-ratio" min="2" max="10" step="0.1" value="3.3" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb; margin-bottom: 12px;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Duljina ručke b: <span id="z1-v-b" style="color: #ea580c;">0.40</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z1-b" min="0.15" max="0.60" step="0.01" value="0.40" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ea580c;">
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #166534; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Teret Fv</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #166534;"><span id="z1-res-fv">9810</span> N</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Tlak p</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="z1-res-p-side">1.25</span> MPa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #eef2ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #c7d2fe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #3730a3; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Mali klip Fm</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #3730a3;"><span id="z1-res-fm">883</span> N</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #c2410c; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Sila ruke F</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c2410c;"><span id="z1-res-handle">61.6</span> N</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Hidrauličko pojačanje</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #2563eb;">× <span id="z1-res-hyd-gain">10.9</span></div>
                </div>
                <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Polužni omjer</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c2410c;">× <span id="z1-res-lever-gain">14.3</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                <p id="z1-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Ovdje se ne pojačava "sila sama od sebe". Teret najprije određuje tlak u ulju, a zatim geometrija klipova i poluge određuje kolika je potrebna sila ruke da bi se održala ravnoteža.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z1-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const mS = document.getElementById('z1-m');
    const rS = document.getElementById('z1-ratio');
    const bS = document.getElementById('z1-b');
    const pressBtn = document.getElementById('z1-press-btn');

    const state = {
        pressAnim: 0,
        pulse: 0,
        frame: 0
    };

    function getValues() {
        const m = parseFloat(mS.value);
        const ratio = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const dv = 0.1;
        const dm = dv / ratio;
        const a = 0.03;
        const b = parseFloat(bS.value);
        const Fv = m * 9.81;
        const Av = dv * dv * Math.PI / 4;
        const Am = dm * dm * Math.PI / 4;
        const p = Fv / Av;
        const Fm = p * Am;
        const F = a * Fm / (a + b);
        const hydGain = Av / Am;
        const leverGain = (a + b) / a;

        return { m, ratio, a, b, dv, dm, Fv, Av, Am, p, Fm, F, hydGain, leverGain };
    }

    function update() {
        const values = getValues();

        document.getElementById('z1-v-m').textContent = values.m.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z1-v-ratio').textContent = values.ratio.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z1-v-b').textContent = values.b.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-fv').textContent = values.Fv.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-fm').textContent = values.Fm.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-p').textContent = (values.p / 1e6).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-p-side').textContent = (values.p / 1e6).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-handle').textContent = values.F.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-hyd-gain').textContent = values.hydGain.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-lever-gain').textContent = values.leverGain.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z1-explainer').textContent = `Za teret ${values.m.toFixed(0)} kg veliki klip traži ${values.Fv.toFixed(0)} N. Geometrija klipova daje hidrauličko pojačanje ×${values.hydGain.toFixed(1)}, pa mali klip osjeća ${values.Fm.toFixed(0)} N. Poluga s krakom b = ${values.b.toFixed(2)} m zatim spušta potrebnu silu ruke na samo ${values.F.toFixed(1)} N.`;

        draw(values);
    }

    function draw(values) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        state.frame += 1;
        state.pulse = Math.max(0, state.pulse * 0.97);

        const baseX = 48;
        const baseY = 316;
        const housingW = 454;
        const hydHeight = 176;
        const leftCylW = 150;
        const rightCylW = 60;
        const rightX = baseX + housingW - rightCylW - 24;
        const leftX = baseX + 18;
        const pressureLevel = Math.min(values.p / 2.6e6, 1);
        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, baseY - hydHeight, 0, baseY + 30);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(96, 165, 250, ${0.18 + pressureLevel * 0.24})`);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.28 + pressureLevel * 0.32})`);

        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(baseX, baseY - 122);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + 170, baseY - 122);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + 170, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + housingW, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + housingW, baseY - 232);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + housingW - 52, baseY - 232);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + housingW - 52, baseY - 62);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + 146, baseY - 62);
        ctx.lineTo(baseX + 146, baseY - 122);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.stroke();

        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            const pathX = 96 + (i % 5) * 74 + state.frame * 0.35;
            const wrapX = baseX + 34 + ((pathX - (baseX + 34)) % 320);
            const y = baseY - 28 - Math.floor(i / 5) * 28;
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.22 + state.pulse * 0.45})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(wrapX, y, 4 + state.pulse * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        const smallOff = state.pressAnim * 18;
        const largeOff = -smallOff / Math.max(values.hydGain, 1);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.fillRect(leftX + 8, baseY - 136 + largeOff, leftCylW - 16, 16);
        const blockSize = 68 + (values.m / 3000) * 34;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.fillRect(leftX + leftCylW / 2 - blockSize / 2, baseY - 136 - blockSize + largeOff, blockSize, blockSize);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText(`${values.m.toFixed(0)} kg`, leftX + leftCylW / 2, baseY - 136 - blockSize / 2 + 5 + largeOff);

        const smWidth = 28 + 70 / values.ratio;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.fillRect(rightX + (rightCylW - smWidth) / 2, baseY - 246 + smallOff, smWidth, 15);

        const pivotX = rightX - 14;
        const pivotY = baseY - 258;
        const handleLen = 78 + (values.b - 0.15) / 0.45 * 98;
        const handleEndX = pivotX + handleLen;
        const handleEndY = pivotY - 38;
        const linkX = rightX + rightCylW / 2;
        const linkTopY = baseY - 248 + smallOff;

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 7;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pivotX, pivotY);
        ctx.lineTo(handleEndX, handleEndY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pivotX + 16, pivotY - 6);
        ctx.lineTo(linkX, linkTopY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(pivotX, pivotY, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillText(`A`, pivotX - 18, pivotY + 4);
        ctx.fillText(`b = ${values.b.toFixed(2)} m`, pivotX + 34, pivotY - 26);
        ctx.fillText(`a = ${values.a.toFixed(2)} m`, pivotX - 6, pivotY + 28);
        ctx.fillText(`hidrauličko pojačanje ×${values.hydGain.toFixed(1)}`, 24, 28);
        ctx.fillText(`polužni omjer ×${values.leverGain.toFixed(1)}`, 24, 48);

        drawArrow(leftX + leftCylW / 2, baseY - 136 + largeOff, leftX + leftCylW / 2, baseY - 54 + largeOff, '#16a34a', 'Fv', values.Fv / 2000);
        drawArrow(linkX, baseY - 308 + smallOff, linkX, baseY - 244 + smallOff, '#3730a3', 'Fm', values.Fm / 700);
        drawArrow(handleEndX, handleEndY - 64, handleEndX, handleEndY - 6, '#ea580c', 'F', Math.max(values.F / 110, 0.6));

        const stage1 = Math.min(1, state.pressAnim * 1.4);
        const stage2 = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (state.pressAnim - 0.22) * 1.6));
        const stage3 = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (state.pressAnim - 0.52) * 2));

        if (stage1 > 0) {
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(22, 163, 74, ${0.08 + stage1 * 0.15})`;
            ctx.fillRect(leftX - 6, baseY - 220, leftCylW + 12, 138);
        }
        if (stage2 > 0) {
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.08 + stage2 * 0.16})`;
            ctx.fillRect(baseX + 110, baseY - 80, 232, 52);
        }
        if (stage3 > 0) {
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(234, 88, 12, ${0.08 + stage3 * 0.15})`;
            ctx.fillRect(pivotX - 16, pivotY - 80, handleLen + 42, 118);
        }

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('veliki klip', leftX + 26, baseY - 90);
        ctx.fillText('isti tlak kroz ulje', baseX + 188, baseY - 92);
        ctx.fillText('mali klip + poluga', rightX - 32, baseY - 286);

        if (state.pressAnim > 0) {
            state.pressAnim -= 0.012;
            if (state.pressAnim < 0) state.pressAnim = 0;
            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, scale) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const len = Math.sqrt((x2 - x1) ** 2 + (y2 - y1) ** 2) * (0.46 + scale);
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        const rx2 = x1 + len * Math.cos(angle);
        const ry2 = y1 + len * Math.sin(angle);

        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(rx2, ry2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(rx2, ry2);
        ctx.lineTo(rx2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), ry2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(rx2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), ry2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
        ctx.fillText(label, rx2 + 8, ry2 - 4);
    }

    pressBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        state.pressAnim = 1;
        state.pulse = 1;
        update();
    });
    [mS, rS, bS].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
    update();
})();
</script>
````

<details class="widget-insight">
<summary>Fizikalni uvid</summary>
<p>Pascalov zakon kaže da je tlak u tekućini isti. Veći omjer promjera omogućuje dizanje velikih tereta malom silom.</p>
</details>

<br>

***

### Zadatak Z2 — Težina klipa i manometarski tlak {.unnumbered}

Za sustav na slici potrebno je odrediti težinu klipa kada manometarsko očitanje tlaka iznosi $70{,}0 \, \text{kPa}$. U sustavu se nalazi ulje gustoće $\rho = 860 \, \text{kg/m}^3$. Klip je promjera $d_k = 1 \, \text{m}$.

**Zadano:** $p_m = 70000 \, \text{Pa}$, $\rho = 860 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $d_k = 1 \, \text{m}$, $h = 1 \, \text{m}$  
**Odrediti:** Težinu klipa $G$, Visinu klipa $h_k$ (za $\rho_{Fe} = 7870 \, \text{kg/m}^3$)

**Rješenje:**

1. **Površina klipa:**
   $A_k = d_k^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 1^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 0,7854 \, [m^2]$
2. **Ravnoteža tlakova na dubini donjeg ruba klipa:**
   $p_{klip} = p_m + \rho \cdot g \cdot h = 70000 + 860 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1 = 78436,6 \, Pa$
3. **Težina klipa ($G$):**
   $G = p_{klip} \cdot A_k = 78436,6 \cdot 0,7854 = \mathbf{61603 \, N}$
4. **Visina klipa ($h_k$):**
   $h_k = \frac{G}{g \cdot \rho_{Fe} \cdot A_k} = \mathbf{1,016 \, m}$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z2-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Z2 laboratorij tlaka</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.42rem;">Klip i manometar: tlak pod klipom minus hidrostatski pad</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">Ovaj widget više ne prikazuje samo očitanje manometra. Sada se odvojeno vidi tlak koji stvara težina klipa i tlak koji se "potroši" penjanjem kroz stupac ulja do manometra.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 18px;">
        <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z2-canvas" width="520" height="410" style="display: block; width: 100%; height: auto;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #334155;">
                Očitanje manometra: <span id="z2-res-pm-top" style="font-weight: 800; color: #dc2626;">70.0</span> kPa
            </div>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9); color: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 0.73rem; line-height: 1.45; max-width: 180px;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #93c5fd; margin-bottom: 4px;">Bilanca tlaka</div>
                <div>1. Klip stvara <strong>G/A</strong></div>
                <div>2. Stupac ulja oduzima <strong>ρgh</strong></div>
                <div>3. Manometar očitava <strong>pₘ</strong></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; width: 100%;">
            <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Gustoća ulja ρ: <span id="z2-v-rho" style="color: #2563eb;">860</span> kg/m³</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-rho" min="700" max="1000" step="10" value="860" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb; margin-bottom: 12px;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Visinska razlika h: <span id="z2-v-h" style="color: #0f766e;">1.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-h" min="0" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #0f766e; margin-bottom: 12px;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Dodatni teret: <span id="z2-v-extra" style="color: #ea580c;">0</span> kN</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-extra" min="0" max="80" step="10" value="0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ea580c;">
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Tlak pod klipom G/A</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="z2-res-piston">78.4</span> kPa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #166534; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Hidrostatski pad ρgh</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #166534;"><span id="z2-res-hydro">8.4</span> kPa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff5f5; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #991b1b; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Manometar pₘ</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #991b1b;"><span id="z2-res-pm">70.0</span> kPa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #eef2ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #c7d2fe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #3730a3; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Težina klipa G</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #3730a3;"><span id="z2-res-g">61.6</span> kN</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 16px; color: #7c2d12;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Numerička bilanca</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.5;" id="z2-eq-vals">...</div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                <p id="z2-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Manometar ne očitava direktno tlak pod klipom. On očitava tlak na svojoj visini, pa je zato potrebno od tlaka pod klipom oduzeti hidrostatski pad kroz stupac ulja do mjesta mjerenja.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z2-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('z2-rho');
    const hS = document.getElementById('z2-h');
    const extraS = document.getElementById('z2-extra');

    const state = { frame: 0 };

    function getValues() {
        const rho = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const extraLoad = parseFloat(extraS.value) * 1000;
        const Ak = Math.PI / 4;
        const g = 9.81;
        const baseG = 61603;
        const currentG = baseG + extraLoad;
        const pistonPressure = currentG / Ak / 1000;
        const hydroDrop = rho * g * h / 1000;
        const pm = pistonPressure - hydroDrop;

        return { rho, h, extraLoad, Ak, g, currentG, pistonPressure, hydroDrop, pm };
    }

    function update() {
        const values = getValues();

        document.getElementById('z2-v-rho').textContent = values.rho.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z2-v-h').textContent = values.h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-v-extra').textContent = (values.extraLoad / 1000).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-piston').textContent = values.pistonPressure.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-hydro').textContent = values.hydroDrop.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-pm').textContent = values.pm.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-pm-top').textContent = values.pm.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-g').textContent = (values.currentG / 1000).toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-eq-vals').textContent = `${values.pm.toFixed(1)} kPa = ${values.pistonPressure.toFixed(1)} kPa - ${values.hydroDrop.toFixed(1)} kPa`;
        document.getElementById('z2-explainer').textContent = `Klip trenutačno stvara ${values.pistonPressure.toFixed(1)} kPa na dnu cilindra, ali se do manometra izgubi ${values.hydroDrop.toFixed(1)} kPa zbog penjanja kroz stupac ulja visine ${values.h.toFixed(1)} m. Zato instrument pokazuje ${values.pm.toFixed(1)} kPa, a ne puni tlak pod klipom.`;

        draw(values);
    }

    function draw(values) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        state.frame += 1;

        const bx = 116;
        const by = 340;
        const width = 130;
        const height = 240;
        const pistonY = by - height - 18;
        const branchX = bx + width;
        const gaugeX = branchX + 130;
        const gaugeY = by - 36;
        const manometerY = by - height - values.h * 48;
        const liquidLevel = Math.min(height, 80 + values.h * 30);
        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(bx, by - height, bx, by);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.16)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.42)');

        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(bx, by - height, width, height);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(bx, by - height, width, height);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.fillRect(bx - 8, pistonY, width + 16, 26);
        const blockH = 42 + Math.min(values.currentG / 1000, 140) * 0.28;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.fillRect(bx + 26, pistonY - blockH, width - 52, blockH);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText(`${(values.currentG / 1000).toFixed(1)} kN`, bx + width / 2, pistonY - blockH / 2 + 4);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 12;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(branchX, gaugeY);
        ctx.lineTo(gaugeX, gaugeY);
        ctx.lineTo(gaugeX, manometerY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(branchX, gaugeY);
        ctx.lineTo(gaugeX, gaugeY);
        ctx.lineTo(gaugeX, manometerY);
        ctx.stroke();

        const ratioP = Math.min(values.pistonPressure / 140, 1);
        const ratioH = Math.min(values.hydroDrop / 30, 1);
        const ratioM = Math.min(values.pm / 120, 1);

        drawBar(30, 88, 42, 210, ratioP, '#2563eb', 'G/A');
        drawBar(92, 128, 42, 170, ratioH, '#16a34a', 'ρgh');
        drawBar(420, 108, 44, 190, ratioM, '#dc2626', 'pm');

        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillText(`h = ${values.h.toFixed(1)} m`, gaugeX + 16, (gaugeY + manometerY) / 2);
        ctx.fillText('tlak pod klipom', 22, 320);
        ctx.fillText('hidrostatski pad', 76, 320);
        ctx.fillText('očitanje manometra', 360, 320);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(branchX + 6, manometerY);
        ctx.lineTo(gaugeX + 42, manometerY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        drawArrow(bx + width / 2, pistonY - 70, bx + width / 2, pistonY - 4, '#dc2626', 'G');
        drawArrow(bx + width / 2, pistonY + 92, bx + width / 2, pistonY + 28, '#2563eb', 'pklip');
        drawArrow(gaugeX + 22, manometerY + 52, gaugeX + 22, manometerY + 4, '#16a34a', 'ρgh');
    }

    function drawBar(x, y, w, h, ratio, color, label) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.fillRect(x, y, w, h);
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.fillRect(x, y + (1 - ratio) * h, w, ratio * h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.strokeRect(x, y, w, h);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText(label, x + w / 2, y - 8);
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
        ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 10, y2 + 2);
    }

    [rhoS, hS, extraS].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
    update();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### Zadatak Z3 — Toplinsko širenje vode i staklene posude {.unnumbered}

Vertikalni stakleni cilindar sadrži 900 ml vode temperature 10 °C, pri čemu visina stupca vode iznosi 90 cm. Voda i stakleni cilindar se zagrijavaju na temperaturu 80 °C. Ukoliko pretpostavimo da nema isparavanja, kolika će biti visina stupca vode ukoliko je linearni koeficijent toplinskog širenja stakla $3,6 \cdot 10^{-6} \, K^{-1}$. Koeficijent volumenskog toplinskog širenja vode pri temperaturi od 10 °C iznosi $0,088 \cdot 10^{-3} \, K^{-1}$, dok pri temperaturi 80 °C iznosi $0,643 \cdot 10^{-3} \, K^{-1}$, gustoća vode pri 10 °C iznosi 999,7 $kg/m^3$. Potrebno je usporediti proračunski dobivenu gustoću vode pri temperaturi sa tabličnom koja za 80 °C iznosi 971,8 $kg/m^3$. Potrebno je odrediti koliko će se vode preliti iz spremnika za proračunatu i tabličnu gustoću ukoliko je pri početnoj temperaturi spremnik bio napunjen do samoga vrha.

**Zadano:** $V_{H2O,10}=0,0009 \, \text{m}^3$, $t_{v1}=10 \, ^\circ\text{C}$, $h_{v,10}=0,9 \, \text{m}$, $\rho_{vt,10}=999,7 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $t_{v2}=80 \, ^\circ\text{C}$, $\rho_{vt,80}=971,8 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $\alpha_s=3,6 \cdot 10^{-6} \, \text{K}^{-1}$, $\beta_{H2O,10}=0,088 \cdot 10^{-3} \, \text{K}^{-1}$, $\beta_{H2O,80}=0,643 \cdot 10^{-3} \, \text{K}^{-1}$  
**Odrediti:** $V_{vt,80}$ (tablična), $V_{vp,80}$ (proračunska), $V_{sp,80}$ (posuda)

**Rješenje:**

Unutrašnjost posude i voda imaju isti volumen u početku: $h_{sp,10} = h_{v,10}, D_{sp,10} = D_{v,10}$.
Masa vode je jednaka pri promjeni temperature:
$$m_v = \rho_v \cdot V_v = \rho_{vt,10} \cdot V_{v,10} = \rho_{vt,80} \cdot V_{vt,80} = 0,89973 \, \text{kg}$$
Proračunsku gustoću računamo pomoću srednjeg koeficijenta $\beta_{sr} = 0,3655 \cdot 10^{-3} \text{K}^{-1}$:
$$\rho_{vp,80} = \rho_{vt,10}(1 - \beta_{sr} \cdot \Delta t) = \mathbf{974,113 \, \text{kg/m}^3}$$
Višak tekućine pri tabličnoj gustoći iznosi:
$$\Delta V_{vt} = V_{vt,80} - V_{sp,80} = \mathbf{25,158 \cdot 10^{-6} \, \text{m}^3}$$
Višak tekućine pri proračunskoj gustoći iznosi:
$$\Delta V_{vp} = V_{vp,80} - V_{sp,80} = \mathbf{22,959 \cdot 10^{-6} \, \text{m}^3}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z3-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Z3 laboratorij širenja</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.42rem;">Voda i staklo se šire različito brzo</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">U istom prikazu možeš birati vodi li scenu proračunski model ili tablična gustoća. Time student vidi da problem nije samo “grijanje”, nego usporedba dva modela volumena vode naspram sporijeg širenja posude.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px;">
            <button id="z3-mode-calc" type="button" style="padding: 10px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: #2563eb; color: white; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer;">Proračunski model</button>
            <button id="z3-mode-table" type="button" style="padding: 10px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: #e2e8f0; color: #475569; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer;">Tablična gustoća</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; align-items: stretch;">
        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 18px; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; padding: 18px; min-height: 390px; align-items: end;">
            <div style="position: relative; height: 320px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-end;">
                <div id="z3-glass-shell" style="position: relative; width: 128px; height: 300px; border: 4px solid #94a3b8; border-top: none; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.75), rgba(226,232,240,0.15)); transition: width 0.35s, height 0.35s;">
                    <div id="z3-initial-outline" style="position: absolute; inset: -4px; border: 2px dashed rgba(100,116,139,0.45); border-top: none; pointer-events: none;"></div>
                    <div id="z3-water-fill" style="position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 90%; background: #3b82f6; transition: height 0.35s, background 0.35s;"></div>
                    <div id="z3-overflow-stream" style="position: absolute; right: -14px; top: -10px; width: 10px; height: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(96,165,250,0.9), rgba(37,99,235,0.25)); border-radius: 999px; transition: height 0.25s, opacity 0.25s; opacity: 0;"></div>
                    <div id="z3-droplets" style="position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: visible;"></div>
                    <div style="position: absolute; top: -10px; left: -10px; right: -10px; height: 10px; background: #94a3b8;"></div>
                </div>
                <div style="position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 0.77rem; color: #334155; line-height: 1.45; max-width: 180px;">
                    <div><strong id="z3-scene-model">Proračunski model</strong></div>
                    <div>Voda: <span id="z3-scene-water">900.0</span> mL</div>
                    <div>Posuda: <span id="z3-scene-glass">900.0</span> mL</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="width: 58px; height: 300px; background: #e2e8f0; position: relative; border: 2px solid #cbd5e0; border-radius: 18px 18px 10px 10px;">
                <div id="z3-mercury" style="position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 10%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f97316, #dc2626); transition: height 0.35s;"></div>
                <div style="position: absolute; bottom: -14px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 54px; height: 54px; background: #ef4444; border: 2px solid #cbd5e0; border-radius: 50%;"></div>
                <div style="position: absolute; inset: 10px 0 10px 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column-reverse; justify-content: space-between; text-align: center; font-size: 9px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">
                    <span>10°</span><span>30°</span><span>50°</span><span>70°</span><span>90°</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
            <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Temperatura T: <span id="z3-v-t" style="color: #dc2626;">10</span> °C</label>
                <input type="range" id="z3-t" min="10" max="100" value="10" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #dc2626;">
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Volumen vode</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="z3-res-vw">900.0</span> mL</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #166534; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Volumen posude</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #166534;"><span id="z3-res-vs">900.0</span> mL</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #eef2ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #c7d2fe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #3730a3; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Gustoća ρ</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #3730a3;"><span id="z3-res-rho">999.7</span> kg/m³</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #c2410c; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Preliveno</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c2410c;"><span id="z3-res-overflow">0.00</span> mL</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 16px;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.74rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px;">Usporedba modela</div>
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #334155; align-items: center;">
                    <div>Preljev, proračunski model</div><strong id="z3-overflow-calc" style="color: #2563eb;">0.00 mL</strong>
                    <div>Preljev, tablična gustoća</div><strong id="z3-overflow-table" style="color: #0f766e;">0.00 mL</strong>
                    <div>Visina stupca vode</div><strong id="z3-res-h" style="color: #475569;">90.0 cm</strong>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                <p id="z3-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Ako se i voda i posuda griju, nije dovoljno pratiti samo temperaturu. Treba usporediti koliko raste volumen vode i koliko se istodobno širi volumen posude; preljev nastaje tek iz njihove razlike.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const tS = document.getElementById('z3-t');
    const waterFill = document.getElementById('z3-water-fill');
    const glassShell = document.getElementById('z3-glass-shell');
    const mercury = document.getElementById('z3-mercury');
    const dropletsCont = document.getElementById('z3-droplets');
    const overflowStream = document.getElementById('z3-overflow-stream');
    const modeCalc = document.getElementById('z3-mode-calc');
    const modeTable = document.getElementById('z3-mode-table');

    const state = { mode: 'calc' };
    const beta = 0.0003655;
    const alpha = 3.6e-6;
    const rho10 = 999.7;
    const rho80Table = 971.8;
    const initialVolume = 900;
    const initialHeight = 90;
    const massWater = rho10 * 0.0009;

    function setMode(mode) {
        state.mode = mode;
        modeCalc.style.background = mode === 'calc' ? '#2563eb' : '#e2e8f0';
        modeCalc.style.color = mode === 'calc' ? '#ffffff' : '#475569';
        modeTable.style.background = mode === 'table' ? '#0f766e' : '#e2e8f0';
        modeTable.style.color = mode === 'table' ? '#ffffff' : '#475569';
        update();
    }

    function createDroplet(color) {
        if (Math.random() > 0.25) return;
        const d = document.createElement('div');
        d.style.position = 'absolute';
        d.style.top = '-4px';
        d.style.right = '-10px';
        d.style.width = '7px';
        d.style.height = '10px';
        d.style.background = color;
        d.style.borderRadius = '999px';
        d.style.opacity = '0.85';
        dropletsCont.appendChild(d);

        let pos = 0;
        const anim = setInterval(() => {
            pos += 3;
            d.style.transform = `translate(${Math.sin(pos * 0.08) * 6}px, ${pos}px)`;
            if (pos > 85) {
                clearInterval(anim);
                d.remove();
            }
        }, 16);
    }

    function update() {
        const T = parseFloat(tS.value);
        const dT = T - 10;
        const tRatio = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, dT / 70));

        const rhoCalc = rho10 / (1 + beta * dT);
        const rhoTable = rho10 + (rho80Table - rho10) * tRatio;
        const Vcalc = initialVolume * (1 + beta * dT);
        const Vtable = (massWater / rhoTable) * 1e6;
        const Vglass = initialVolume * (1 + 3 * alpha * dT);

        const currentVolume = state.mode === 'calc' ? Vcalc : Vtable;
        const currentRho = state.mode === 'calc' ? rhoCalc : rhoTable;
        const overflowCalc = Math.max(Vcalc - Vglass, 0);
        const overflowTable = Math.max(Vtable - Vglass, 0);
        const currentOverflow = state.mode === 'calc' ? overflowCalc : overflowTable;
        const currentHeight = initialHeight * (currentVolume / Vglass);

        document.getElementById('z3-v-t').textContent = T.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-vw').textContent = currentVolume.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-vs').textContent = Vglass.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-rho').textContent = currentRho.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-h').textContent = currentHeight.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-overflow').textContent = currentOverflow.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z3-overflow-calc').textContent = `${overflowCalc.toFixed(2)} mL`;
        document.getElementById('z3-overflow-table').textContent = `${overflowTable.toFixed(2)} mL`;
        document.getElementById('z3-scene-model').textContent = state.mode === 'calc' ? 'Proračunski model' : 'Tablična gustoća';
        document.getElementById('z3-scene-water').textContent = currentVolume.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-scene-glass').textContent = Vglass.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-explainer').textContent = state.mode === 'calc'
            ? `Proračunski model koristi srednji koeficijent volumenskog širenja vode. Na ${T.toFixed(0)} °C voda naraste na ${Vcalc.toFixed(1)} mL, dok se posuda proširi tek na ${Vglass.toFixed(1)} mL, pa nastaje preljev od ${overflowCalc.toFixed(2)} mL.`
            : `Tablični model vodi se gustoćom vode, pa volumen dobivaš iz očuvanja mase. Na ${T.toFixed(0)} °C tablična gustoća pada na ${rhoTable.toFixed(1)} kg/m³, što daje volumen ${Vtable.toFixed(1)} mL i preljev ${overflowTable.toFixed(2)} mL.`;

        const fillRatio = Math.min(currentVolume / Vglass, 1.06);
        const shellScale = 1 + dT * alpha * 12;
        const red = Math.floor(59 + tRatio * (239 - 59));
        const green = Math.floor(130 + tRatio * (68 - 130));
        const blue = Math.floor(246 + tRatio * (68 - 246));
        const waterColor = `rgb(${red}, ${green}, ${blue})`;

        glassShell.style.width = `${128 * shellScale}px`;
        glassShell.style.height = `${300 * shellScale}px`;
        waterFill.style.height = `${Math.min(fillRatio * 100, 100)}%`;
        waterFill.style.background = waterColor;
        mercury.style.height = `${Math.max(10, T)}%`;
        overflowStream.style.height = `${Math.min(110, currentOverflow * 2.6)}px`;
        overflowStream.style.opacity = currentOverflow > 0.2 ? '1' : '0';
        overflowStream.style.background = `linear-gradient(180deg, ${waterColor}, rgba(37,99,235,0.2))`;

        if (currentOverflow > 0.2) createDroplet(waterColor);
    }

    modeCalc.addEventListener('click', () => setMode('calc'));
    modeTable.addEventListener('click', () => setMode('table'));
    tS.addEventListener('input', update);
    setMode('calc');
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### Zadatak Z4 — Modul stlačivosti tekućine {.unnumbered}

Tekućina stlačena u cilindru zauzima početni volumen od $1000 \, \text{cm}^3$ pri tlaku od $1 \, \text{MPa}$, dok pri tlaku od $2 \, \text{MPa}$ zauzima volumen od $995 \, \text{cm}^3$. Potrebno je odrediti modul stlačivosti tekućine.

**Zadano:** $V_1=1000 \cdot 10^{-6} \, \text{m}^3$, $p_1=1 \cdot 10^6 \, \text{Pa}$, $V_2=995 \cdot 10^{-6} \, \text{m}^3$, $p_2=2 \cdot 10^6 \, \text{Pa}$  
**Odrediti:** Modul stlačivosti $E$

**Rješenje:**
$$E = - \frac{dp}{dV/V} = - \frac{(p_2 - p_1) \cdot V_1}{V_2 - V_1} = - \frac{1 \cdot 10^6 \cdot 1000}{995 - 1000} = \mathbf{200 \, \text{MPa}}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z4-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Z4 laboratorij stlačivosti</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.42rem;">Isti tlak, potpuno drugačiji odgovor tekućine i plina</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">Widget sada izravno uspoređuje kako isti rast tlaka jedva smanji volumen vode, dok plin pri istom opterećenju vidljivo kolabira. Time modul stlačivosti više nije apstraktan broj nego mjera “krutosti volumena”.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; align-items: stretch;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; min-height: 320px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z4-canvas" width="540" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #334155;">
                Tlak: <span id="z4-v-p" style="font-weight: 800; color: #2563eb;">1</span> MPa
            </div>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9); color: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 0.73rem; line-height: 1.45; max-width: 185px;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #93c5fd; margin-bottom: 4px;">Ključna ideja</div>
                <div>Velik <strong>E</strong> znači da treba puno tlaka za malu promjenu volumena.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Tlak p: <span id="z4-v-p-side" style="color: #2563eb;">1</span> MPa</label>
                <input type="range" id="z4-p" min="1" max="100" step="1" value="1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
            </div>
            
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 10px; text-transform: uppercase;">Relativna promjena volumena</div>
                <div style="display: grid; gap: 10px;">
                    <div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 4px;"><span style="color: #2563eb;">Voda</span><strong id="z4-val-liquid" style="color: #1d4ed8;">0.04%</strong></div>
                        <div style="height: 10px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden;"><div id="z4-bar-liquid" style="width: 0%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #60a5fa, #2563eb);"></div></div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 4px;"><span style="color: #dc2626;">Zrak</span><strong id="z4-val-gas" style="color: #b91c1c;">90%</strong></div>
                        <div style="height: 10px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden;"><div id="z4-bar-gas" style="width: 0%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #fca5a5, #ef4444);"></div></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Volumen vode</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="z4-vol-liquid">999.6</span> cm³</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff5f5; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #b91c1c; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Volumen zraka</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #b91c1c;"><span id="z4-vol-gas">100.0</span> cm³</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                <p id="z4-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Modul stlačivosti nije samo broj u formuli. On određuje koliko se gornji klip mora spustiti da bi volumen stvarno pao. Kod tekućine je taj pomak jedva vidljiv, dok je kod plina dramatičan.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const z4c = document.getElementById('z4-canvas');
    const z4ctx = z4c.getContext('2d');
    const z4pS = document.getElementById('z4-p');

    let liquidParticles = Array.from({ length: 70 }, () => ({
        x: 40 + Math.random() * 170,
        y: 110 + Math.random() * 150,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
        vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5
    }));
    let gasParticles = Array.from({ length: 42 }, () => ({
        x: 320 + Math.random() * 150,
        y: 90 + Math.random() * 170,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2.5,
        vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2.5
    }));
    let frame = 0;

    function updateZ4() {
        const p = parseFloat(z4pS.value);
        document.getElementById('z4-v-p').textContent = p.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z4-v-p-side').textContent = p.toFixed(0);

        const liquidCompression = (p / 2340) * 100;
        const gasCompression = Math.min((p / 100) * 82, 82);
        const liquidVolume = 1000 * (1 - liquidCompression / 100);
        const gasVolume = 1000 * (1 - gasCompression / 100);

        document.getElementById('z4-bar-liquid').style.width = `${Math.min(liquidCompression * 12, 100)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-val-liquid').textContent = `${liquidCompression.toFixed(2)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-bar-gas').style.width = `${gasCompression.toFixed(1)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-val-gas').textContent = `${gasCompression.toFixed(1)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-vol-liquid').textContent = liquidVolume.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z4-vol-gas').textContent = gasVolume.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z4-explainer').textContent = `Na ${p.toFixed(0)} MPa voda izgubi tek ${liquidCompression.toFixed(2)}% volumena, pa njezin klip gotovo da se ne pomakne. Plin pri istom opterećenju izgubi oko ${gasCompression.toFixed(1)}% volumena, zato se ondje vidi veliko skupljanje i mnogo veća promjena rasporeda čestica.`;

        draw(liquidCompression, gasCompression, p);
    }

    function draw(liqComp, gasComp, p) {
        frame += 1;
        z4ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 540, 320);
        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        z4ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 540, 320);

        const left = { x: 34, y: 60, w: 190, h: 210 };
        const right = { x: 300, y: 60, w: 190, h: 210 };
        const liqTop = left.y + liqComp * 1.6;
        const gasTop = right.y + gasComp * 1.9;

        drawChamber(left, liqTop, '#60a5fa', '#1d4ed8', 'Tekućina', 'velik E, mali ΔV');
        drawChamber(right, gasTop, '#fca5a5', '#dc2626', 'Plin', 'mali E, velik ΔV');

        liquidParticles.forEach((pt) => {
            pt.x += pt.vx;
            pt.y += pt.vy;
            if (pt.x < left.x + 10 || pt.x > left.x + left.w - 10) pt.vx *= -1;
            if (pt.y < liqTop + 12 || pt.y > left.y + left.h - 10) pt.vy *= -1;
            z4ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85)';
            z4ctx.beginPath();
            z4ctx.arc(pt.x, pt.y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            z4ctx.fill();
        });

        gasParticles.forEach((pt) => {
            pt.x += pt.vx;
            pt.y += pt.vy;
            if (pt.x < right.x + 10 || pt.x > right.x + right.w - 10) pt.vx *= -1;
            if (pt.y < gasTop + 12 || pt.y > right.y + right.h - 10) pt.vy *= -1;
            z4ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.75)';
            z4ctx.beginPath();
            z4ctx.arc(pt.x, pt.y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            z4ctx.fill();
        });
````
