````{=html}
        drawPressureArrow(left.x + left.w / 2, 18, left.x + left.w / 2, liqTop - 6, '#2563eb', `p = ${p.toFixed(0)} MPa`);
        drawPressureArrow(right.x + right.w / 2, 18, right.x + right.w / 2, gasTop - 6, '#dc2626', `p = ${p.toFixed(0)} MPa`);

        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ4);
    }

    function drawChamber(box, topY, fillColor, accent, title, subtitle) {
        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        z4ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        z4ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        z4ctx.strokeRect(box.x, box.y, box.w, box.h);

        z4ctx.fillStyle = fillColor;
        z4ctx.fillRect(box.x, topY, box.w, box.y + box.h - topY);

        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        z4ctx.fillRect(box.x - 4, topY - 16, box.w + 8, 16);

        z4ctx.fillStyle = accent;
        z4ctx.font = 'bold 14px Inter';
        z4ctx.fillText(title, box.x + 10, box.y + box.h + 26);
        z4ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        z4ctx.fillText(subtitle, box.x + 10, box.y + box.h + 44);
    }

    function drawPressureArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        z4ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        z4ctx.fillStyle = color;
        z4ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        z4ctx.beginPath();
        z4ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        z4ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        z4ctx.stroke();
        z4ctx.beginPath();
        z4ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        z4ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        z4ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        z4ctx.closePath();
        z4ctx.fill();
        z4ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        z4ctx.fillText(label, x1 - 34, y1 - 6);
    }

    z4pS.addEventListener('input', updateZ4);
    updateZ4();
})();
</script>
````

***

### Zadatak Z5 — Gustoća oceana na velikim dubinama {.unnumbered}

Na dubini od 7 km u oceanu tlak iznosi 71,6 MPa. Gustoća na površini iznosi $\rho = 1025 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, pri čemu modul stlačivosti iznosi 2,34 GPa za dotični raspon tlaka. Potrebno je odrediti gustoću fluida na dubini od 7 km i postotak promjene gustoće fluida između površine i dubine od 7 km.

**Zadano:** $h=7000 \, \text{m}$, $p_h=71,6 \cdot 10^6 \, \text{Pa}$, $\rho_0=1025 \, \text{kg/m}^3$, $E_0=2,34 \cdot 10^9 \, \text{Pa}$  
**Odrediti:** Gustoća na dubini $\rho_h$, Postotak promjene $\Delta \rho$

**Rješenje:**
$$\rho_h = \rho_0 \cdot e^{\frac{p_h - p_{atm}}{E}} \approx \rho_0 \cdot \left(1 + \frac{\Delta p}{E}\right) = 1025 \cdot \left(1 + \frac{71,6 \cdot 10^6}{2,34 \cdot 10^9}\right) = \mathbf{1056,36 \, \text{kg/m}^3}$$
Postotak promjene gustoće: $\frac{\Delta \rho}{\rho_0} = \mathbf{3,06\%}$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z5-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 30px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z5: Gustoća fluida na dubini oceana</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; height: 350px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff;">
            <div id="z5-ocean-bg" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #38bdf8 0%, #0369a1 50%, #082f49 100%); position: relative;">
                <!-- Submarine -->
                <div id="z5-sub" style="position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); top: 10%; font-size: 30px; transition: top 0.5s ease-out;">🚢</div>
                <!-- Depth line -->
                <div id="z5-depth-line" style="position: absolute; width: 100%; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.3); top: 10%; transition: top 0.5s;">
                    <span style="position: absolute; right: 10px; top: -15px; font-size: 10px; color: #ffffff;"><span id="z5-v-depth-val">0</span> m</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Molecular grid (using canvas for performance) -->
                <canvas id="z5-molecules" width="400" height="350" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">Dubina: <span id="z5-v-depth">0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z5-depth" min="0" max="7000" step="100" value="0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #38bdf8;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #0369a1;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #0369a1; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px;">PARAMETRI NA DUBINI:</div>
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
                    <div style="color: #475569;">Tlak:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;"><span id="z5-res-p">0.1</span> MPa</div>
                    <div style="color: #475569;">Gustoća:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;"><span id="z5-res-rho">1025</span> kg/m³</div>
                    <div style="color: #475569;">Porast ρ:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #ef4444;"><span id="z5-res-perc">0.00</span> %</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Tlak u oceanu raste s dubinom i komprimira vodu. Na 7 km dubine gustoća je vidljivo veća nego na površini uslijed modula stlačivosti.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const z5dS = document.getElementById('z5-depth');
    const z5sub = document.getElementById('z5-sub');
    const z5line = document.getElementById('z5-depth-line');
    const z5c = document.getElementById('z5-molecules');
    const z5ctx = z5c.getContext('2d');

    function updateZ5() {
        const d = parseFloat(z5dS.value);
        document.getElementById('z5-v-depth').innerText = d;
        document.getElementById('z5-v-depth-val').innerText = d;
        
        const p = 0.1 + (1025 * 9.81 * d / 1e6);
        const rho = 1025 * (1 + (p-0.1)/2340);
        const perc = ((rho/1025)-1)*100;
        
        document.getElementById('z5-res-p').innerText = p.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z5-res-rho').innerText = rho.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z5-res-perc').innerText = perc.toFixed(2);

        const yPerc = (d / 7000) * 80 + 10;
        z5sub.style.top = yPerc + "%";
        z5line.style.top = yPerc + "%";
        z5sub.innerText = d > 500 ? "🛸" : "🚢";

        // Draw molecular grid density
        z5ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,350);
        z5ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.3)";
        const step = 20 - (perc * 2);
        for(let x=0; x<400; x+=step) {
            for(let y=0; y<350; y+=step) {
                z5ctx.fillRect(x, y, 2, 2);
            }
        }
    }
    z5dS.oninput = updateZ5; updateZ5();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### Zadatak Z6 — Profil brzine u cijevi {.unnumbered}
Voda struji kroz cijev. Profil brzine u poprečnom presjeku zadan je izrazom $v = \left(\frac{\beta}{4\mu}\right) \left(\frac{d^2}{4} - r^2\right)$, pri čemu je $v$ - brzina vode ovisna o polumjeru $r$, $\beta$ - konstanta, $\mu$ - viskoznost vode, $d$ – promjer cijevi, a $r$ - radijalna udaljenost od središnje osi cijevi. Odrediti tangencijalno naprezanje na stjenkama cijevi uslijed strujanja vode. Odrediti tangencijalno naprezanje na polumjeru $r = \frac{d}{4}$. Ukoliko ukupna duljina cijevi iznosi $L$, odrediti ukupnu tangencijalnu silu na stijenkama cijevi.

**Zadano:** $v(r) = \left(\frac{\beta}{4\mu}\right)\left(\frac{d^2}{4} - r^2\right)$, $r = \frac{d}{4}$  
**Odrediti:** Tangencijalno naprezanje na stjenki $\tau_s$, Tangencijalno naprezanje na $r = d/4$ $\tau_{d/4}$, Tangencijalna sila na stijenkama $F_{\tau s}$

**Rješenje:**

Gradijent brzine: $\frac{dv}{dr} = -\frac{\beta \cdot r}{2\mu}$
Newtonov zakon: $\tau = \mu \cdot \frac{dv}{dy}$ (gdje je $y = R - r \implies dy = -dr$)
$$\tau = -\mu \frac{dv}{dr} = \frac{\beta \cdot r}{2}$$
a) Na stjenki ($r = d/2$): $\tau_s = \mathbf{\frac{\beta \cdot d}{4}}$
b) Na $r = d/4$: $\tau_{d/4} = \mathbf{\frac{\beta \cdot d}{8}}$
c) Sila: $F_{\tau s} = \tau_s \cdot A = \tau_s \cdot (d \pi L) = \mathbf{\frac{\beta \pi L d^2}{4}}$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z6-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z6: Newtonov zakon viskoznosti (Poiseuilleov tok)</h4>
    
    <div style="position: relative; margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <canvas id="z6-main-canvas" width="800" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 320px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; cursor: crosshair;"></canvas>
        <div id="z6-inspect-tooltip" style="position: absolute; display: none; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9); color: white; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; pointer-events: none; z-index: 10;">
            <b>Radijalni položaj:</b> <span id="z6-tt-r">0</span> mm<br>
            <b>Brzina v:</b> <span id="z6-tt-v">0</span> m/s<br>
            <b>Naprezanje τ:</b> <span id="z6-tt-tau">0</span> Pa
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; background: #ffffff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Viskoznost (μ): <span id="z6-v-mu">1.0</span> mPa·s</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-mu" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="10" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Gradijent tlaka (β): <span id="z6-v-beta">100</span> Pa/m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-beta" min="10" max="500" step="10" value="100" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Promjer (d): <span id="z6-v-d">100</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-d" min="40" max="150" step="5" value="100" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Duljina cijevi (L): <span id="z6-v-l">2.0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-l" min="0.5" max="10" step="0.5" value="2" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-top: 15px;">
        <div style="background: #fee2e2; border: 1px solid #fecaca; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #b91c1c; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Naprezanje na stijenci</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #991b1b;"><span id="z6-res-tau-wall">2.50</span> Pa</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7f1d1d;">tau_s = beta d / 4</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #c2410c; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Naprezanje na r = d/4</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #9a3412;"><span id="z6-res-tau-quarter">1.25</span> Pa</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #9a3412;">tau_d/4 = beta d / 8</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1d4ed8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Ukupna sila na stijenci</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;"><span id="z6-res-force-wall">1.57</span> N</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #1e3a8a;">F_tau = tau_s pi d L</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #ecfeff; border: 1px solid #a5f3fc; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f766e; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Maksimalna brzina na osi</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #115e59;"><span id="z6-res-vmax">1.56</span> m/s</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #134e4a;">v_max u središtu presjeka</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Klikni bilo gdje na cijev da bi istražio profil brzine i tangencijalno naprezanje. Uoči da je $\tau$ najveći na stijenci (crveno), a nula na osi (zeleno).
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z6-main-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const muS = document.getElementById('z6-mu');
    const betaS = document.getElementById('z6-beta');
    const dS = document.getElementById('z6-d');
    const lS = document.getElementById('z6-l');
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('z6-inspect-tooltip');

    let particles = Array.from({length: 70}, () => ({
        x: Math.random(),
        y: Math.random() * 2 - 1,
        size: 1.8 + Math.random() * 1.6
    }));
    let mousePos = null;
    let frame = 0;

    canvas.onmousemove = (e) => {
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        mousePos = { x: e.clientX - rect.left, y: e.clientY - rect.top };
    };
    canvas.onmouseleave = () => { mousePos = null; tooltip.style.display = 'none'; };

    function clamp(value, min, max) {
        return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
    }

    function panel(ctx, x, y, w, h, title, accent) {
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#dbeafe";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, 16, true, true);
        ctx.fillStyle = accent;
        ctx.font = "600 13px Inter";
        ctx.fillText(title, x + 14, y + 24);
    }

    function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r, fill, stroke) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
        ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
        ctx.closePath();
        if (fill) ctx.fill();
        if (stroke) ctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width = 2) {
        const headlen = 8;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
    }

    function draw() {
        frame += 1;
        const mu = parseFloat(muS.value) / 1000;
        const beta = parseFloat(betaS.value);
        const d_mm = parseFloat(dS.value);
        const L = parseFloat(lS.value);
        const R = d_mm / 2;
        const d_m = d_mm / 1000;
        const tauWall = beta * d_m / 4;
        const tauQuarter = beta * d_m / 8;
        const v_max = (beta * d_m * d_m) / (16 * mu);
        const F_tau = tauWall * Math.PI * d_m * L;

        document.getElementById('z6-v-mu').innerText = (mu*1000).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z6-v-beta').innerText = beta;
        document.getElementById('z6-v-d').innerText = d_mm;
        document.getElementById('z6-v-l').innerText = L.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-wall').innerText = tauWall.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-quarter').innerText = tauQuarter.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-force-wall').innerText = F_tau.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-vmax').innerText = v_max.toFixed(2);

        const w = canvas.width;
        const h = canvas.height;
        const left = { x: 24, y: 22, w: 318, h: 276 };
        const right = { x: 366, y: 22, w: 410, h: 276 };
        const channel = {
            x: left.x + 26,
            y: left.y + 46,
            w: left.w - 52,
            h: left.h - 88
        };
        const cy = channel.y + channel.h / 2;
        const drawR = Math.min(channel.h * 0.43, 92);
        const topWall = cy - drawR;
        const bottomWall = cy + drawR;
        const chart = {
            x: right.x + 54,
            y: right.y + 34,
            w: right.w - 88,
            h: right.h - 68
        };

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);

        const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h);
        bgGrad.addColorStop(0, "#f8fbff");
        bgGrad.addColorStop(1, "#eef6ff");
        ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

        panel(ctx, left.x, left.y, left.w, left.h, "Tok u cijevi", "#0f766e");
        panel(ctx, right.x, right.y, right.w, right.h, "Profil brzine v(r)", "#1d4ed8");

        // Left panel: channel
        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(channel.x, topWall, channel.x, bottomWall);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.55)");
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18)");
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.55)");
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        roundRect(ctx, channel.x, topWall, channel.w, bottomWall - topWall, 18, true, false);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#334155";
        ctx.fillRect(channel.x, topWall - 12, channel.w, 10);
        ctx.fillRect(channel.x, bottomWall + 2, channel.w, 10);

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(channel.x, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(channel.x + channel.w, cy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.font = "12px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillText("os cijevi", channel.x + 6, cy - 8);
        ctx.fillText("stijenka", channel.x + 6, topWall - 16);
        ctx.fillText("stijenka", channel.x + 6, bottomWall + 28);

        // Layer arrows
        for (let i = 0; i <= 8; i++) {
            const y = topWall + (i / 8) * (bottomWall - topWall);
            const r_mm = ((y - cy) / drawR) * R;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const len = clamp((v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * 120, 8, 120);
            const alpha = 0.2 + 0.55 * (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6));
            drawArrow(ctx, channel.x + 18, y, channel.x + 18 + len, y, `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${alpha})`, 2.5);
        }

        // Particles
        particles.forEach((p) => {
            const r_mm = p.y * R;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const speedRatio = v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6);
            p.x += 0.003 + speedRatio * 0.018;
            if (p.x > 1.05) p.x = -0.05;
            const px = channel.x + p.x * channel.w;
            const py = cy + p.y * drawR;
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(14, 116, 144, ${0.25 + 0.6 * speedRatio})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        // Small formula badge
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.92)";
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#dbeafe";
        roundRect(ctx, channel.x + channel.w - 150, topWall + 14, 136, 34, 10, true, true);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e40af";
        ctx.font = "600 12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("v(r) = vmax (1 - (r/R)^2)", channel.x + channel.w - 140, topWall + 36);

        // Right panel: chart axes
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([4, 6]);
        for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
            const gy = chart.y + (i / 4) * chart.h;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(chart.x, gy);
            ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, gy);
            ctx.stroke();
        }
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.fillText("+R", chart.x - 24, chart.y + 4);
        ctx.fillText("0", chart.x - 16, chart.y + chart.h / 2 + 4);
        ctx.fillText("-R", chart.x - 24, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.fillText("r", chart.x - 10, chart.y - 8);
        ctx.fillText("v", chart.x + chart.w + 8, chart.y + chart.h + 4);

        // Profile fill and curve
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y);
        for (let i = 0; i <= 120; i++) {
            const t = i / 120;
            const r_mm = R - 2 * R * t;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const px = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);
            const py = chart.y + t * chart.h;
            ctx.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.closePath();
        const chartFill = ctx.createLinearGradient(chart.x, chart.y, chart.x + chart.w, chart.y);
        chartFill.addColorStop(0, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.15)");
        chartFill.addColorStop(1, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.32)");
        ctx.fillStyle = chartFill;
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2563eb";
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i <= 120; i++) {
            const t = i / 120;
            const r_mm = R - 2 * R * t;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const px = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);
            const py = chart.y + t * chart.h;
            if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(px, py);
            else ctx.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        // Centerline and wall stress bars
        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.9)";
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, chart.y + chart.h / 2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        const stressBarW = clamp(16 + tauWall * 10, 16, 74);
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18)";
        ctx.fillRect(chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW, chart.y, stressBarW, 12);
        ctx.fillRect(chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW, chart.y + chart.h - 12, stressBarW, 12);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#b91c1c";
        ctx.font = "600 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("visoko tau", chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW - 58, chart.y + 10);
        ctx.fillText("visoko tau", chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW - 58, chart.y + chart.h - 2);

        // Interactive highlight by radial position
        if (mousePos && mousePos.y >= topWall && mousePos.y <= bottomWall) {
            const r_inspect_mm = ((mousePos.y - cy) / drawR) * R;
            const r_m = r_inspect_mm / 1000;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - r_m**2));
            const tau = Math.abs(beta * r_m / 2);
            const inspectYChart = chart.y + ((R - r_inspect_mm) / (2 * R)) * chart.h;
            const inspectXChart = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);

            tooltip.style.display = 'block';
            tooltip.style.left = (mousePos.x + 15) + 'px';
            tooltip.style.top = (mousePos.y + 15) + 'px';
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-r').innerText = r_inspect_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-v').innerText = v.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-tau').innerText = tau.toFixed(2);

            ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.42)";
            ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(channel.x, mousePos.y);
            ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, mousePos.y);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(channel.x + 14, mousePos.y, 4.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(inspectXChart, inspectYChart, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            drawArrow(ctx, channel.x + channel.w - 86, mousePos.y, channel.x + channel.w - 86 + Math.min(58, 14 + tau * 9), mousePos.y, "#ef4444", 2.5);
        } else {
            tooltip.style.display = 'none';
        }

        // Bottom legends
        ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.font = "12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("sporije uz stijenku", channel.x, left.y + left.h - 18);
        ctx.fillText("najbrže na osi", channel.x + channel.w - 92, left.y + left.h - 18);
        ctx.fillText("parabolični profil", chart.x, right.y + right.h - 14);
        ctx.fillText("tau raste prema stijenci", chart.x + chart.w - 138, right.y + right.h - 14);

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    draw();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### Zadatak Z7 — Blok na kosini {.unnumbered}

Blok kvadratnog presjeka težine $1{,}1 \, \text{kN}$, duljine bridova $250 \, \text{mm}$ klizi kosinom koja sa horizontalnom osi zatvara kut od $20^\circ$ po sloju ulja debljine $6 \, \mu\text{m}$. Ukoliko pretpostavimo linearan profil brzine i konstantnu debljinu sloja ulja, potrebno je odrediti ustaljenu brzinu bloka. Dinamička viskoznost ulja iznosi $7 \, \text{mPa}\cdot\text{s}$.

**Zadano:** $G = 1100 \, \text{N}$, $a = 0{,}25 \, \text{m}$, $\alpha = 20^\circ$, $\delta = 6 \cdot 10^{-6} \, \text{m}$, $\mu = 0{,}007 \, \text{Pa}\cdot\text{s}$  
**Odrediti:** Ustaljena brzina bloka $v_B$

**Rješenje:**

Sila koja uzrokuje gibanje:
$$F_x = G \cdot \sin\alpha = 1100 \cdot \sin 20^\circ = 376{,}2 \, \text{N}$$

Otpor uslijed viskoznosti:
$$F_\tau = \tau \cdot A = \mu \cdot \frac{v}{\delta} \cdot a^2$$

Izjednačavanjem:
$$F_x = F_\tau \implies v_B = \frac{G \cdot \sin\alpha \cdot \delta}{\mu \cdot a^2} = \mathbf{5{,}16 \, \text{m/s}}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z7-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z7: Blok na kosini s uljnim filmom</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 300px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z7-canvas" width="500" height="300" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0; font-size: 0.7rem;">
                <b>Zoom na sloj ulja (δ):</b><br>
                <canvas id="z7-zoom-canvas" width="100" height="60" style="width: 100px; height: 60px; background: #f0f9ff; border: 1px solid #bae6fd;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Kut α: <span id="z7-v-alpha">20</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-alpha" min="5" max="45" step="1" value="20" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block; color: #475569;">Viskoznost μ: <span id="z7-v-mu">7</span> mPa·s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-mu" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="7" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block; color: #475569;">Sloj ulja δ: <span id="z7-v-delta">6</span> μm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-delta" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="6" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;">
                <div style="font-weight: 700; color: #166534; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.7rem; margin-bottom: 4px;">Ustaljena brzina v_B</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #166534;"><span id="z7-res-v">5.16</span> m/s</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Sila teže vuče blok niz kosinu, dok viskozno trenje u tankom sloju ulja pruža otpor. Ravnoteža tih sila određuje konstantnu brzinu gibanja.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const z7c = document.getElementById('z7-canvas'); const z7ctx = z7c.getContext('2d');
    const z7zc = document.getElementById('z7-zoom-canvas'); const z7zctx = z7zc.getContext('2d');
    const z7aS = document.getElementById('z7-alpha'); const z7mS = document.getElementById('z7-mu'); const z7dS = document.getElementById('z7-delta');

    let z7Pos = 0;
    function updateZ7() {
        const alpha = parseFloat(z7aS.value) * Math.PI / 180;
        const mu = parseFloat(z7mS.value) / 1000;
        const delta = parseFloat(z7dS.value) / 1e6;
        const G = 1100; const side = 0.25;
        const v = (G * Math.sin(alpha) * delta) / (mu * side * side);
        document.getElementById('z7-v-alpha').innerText = z7aS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-v-mu').innerText = z7mS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-v-delta').innerText = z7dS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-res-v').innerText = v.toFixed(2);
        z7Pos += v * 0.5; if(z7Pos > 600) z7Pos = -100;
        z7ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,300);
        z7ctx.save();
        z7ctx.translate(0, 50);
        z7ctx.rotate(alpha);
        z7ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.3)";
        z7ctx.fillRect(-100, 0, 700, 5);
        z7ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        z7ctx.fillRect(z7Pos, -40, 60, 40);
        const cx = z7Pos + 30, cy = -20;
        drawArrow(z7ctx, cx, cy, cx, cy + 50/Math.cos(alpha), "#166534", "G"); 
        drawArrow(z7ctx, cx, cy, cx - 40, cy, "#ef4444", "Fτ"); 
        z7ctx.restore();
        z7zctx.clearRect(0,0,100,60);
        z7zctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.4)";
        z7zctx.fillRect(0, 10, 100, 40);
        z7zctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; z7zctx.lineWidth = 2;
        z7zctx.beginPath(); z7zctx.moveTo(10, 50); z7zctx.lineTo(10 + Math.min(v*5, 80), 10); z7zctx.stroke();
        z7zctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b"; z7zctx.fillRect(0, 0, 100, 10); 
        z7zctx.fillRect(0, 50, 100, 10); 
        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ7);
    }
    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font="bold 10px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x2+5, y2+5); }
    }
    [z7aS, z7mS, z7dS].forEach(s => s.oninput = updateZ7); updateZ7();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### Zadatak Z8 — Sila na rotirajuće vratilo {.unnumbered}

Vratilo promjera $70 \, \text{mm}$ i duljine $250 \, \text{mm}$ giba se brzinom od $400 \, \text{mm/s}$ duž rukavca ležaja promjera $70{,}2 \, \text{mm}$. Pretpostavljena je jednolika zračnost ispunjena uljem temperature $20^\circ\text{C}$, pri čemu kinematička viskoznost iznosi $0{,}005 \, \text{m}^2/\text{s}$, dok je relativna gustoća ulja $0{,}9$. Potrebno je odrediti silu kojom ulje djeluje na vratilo.

**Zadano:** $D_v=0{,}07 \, \text{m}$, $v=0{,}4 \, \text{m/s}$, $D_L=0{,}0702 \, \text{m}$, $L=0{,}25 \, \text{m}$, $\nu=0{,}005 \, \text{m}^2/\text{s}$, $\bar{\rho}_u=0{,}9$  
**Odrediti:** Sila kojom ulje djeluje na vratilo $F_\tau$

**Rješenje:**

Dodirna površina:
$$A = D_v \cdot \pi \cdot L = 0{,}054978 \, \text{m}^2$$

Gustoća ulja ($\rho_{v,20} = 998 \, \text{kg/m}^3$):
$$\rho = \bar{\rho}_u \cdot \rho_{v,20} = 0{,}9 \cdot 998 = 898{,}2 \, \text{kg/m}^3$$

Dinamička viskoznost:
$$\mu = \nu \cdot \rho = 0{,}005 \cdot 898{,}2 = 4{,}491 \, \text{Pa}\cdot\text{s}$$

Zračnost:
$$y = \frac{D_L - D_v}{2} = 0{,}0001 \, \text{m}$$

Sila:
$$F_\tau = \mu \frac{v}{y} A = 4{,}491 \cdot \frac{0{,}4}{0{,}0001} \cdot 0{,}054978 = \mathbf{987{,}6 \, \text{N}}$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z8-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z8: Vratilo u ležaju (Viskozno trenje)</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.2; min-width: 300px; position: relative; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 250px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <canvas id="z8-canvas" width="400" height="250" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Brzina v: <span id="z8-v-v">0.4</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z8-v" min="0.1" max="2.0" step="0.1" value="0.4" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block; color: #475569;">Zračnost y: <span id="z8-v-y">0.10</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z8-y" min="0.05" max="0.5" step="0.05" value="0.1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #bae6fd;">
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                    <div style="color: #0369a1; font-weight: 600;">Sila otpora Fτ:</div><div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0369a1;"><span id="z8-res-f">987.6</span> N</div>
                    <div style="color: #0369a1; font-weight: 600;">Snaga trenja P:</div><div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0369a1;"><span id="z8-res-p">395.0</span> W</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fizikalni-uvid">
    Rotacija vratila unutar ležaja stvara tangencijalno naprezanje u tankom sloju ulja. Što je zračnost manja ili viskoznost veća, to je sila otpora i potrošnja snage veća.
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const z8c = document.getElementById('z8-canvas'); const z8ctx = z8c.getContext('2d');
    const z8vS = document.getElementById('z8-v'); const z8yS = document.getElementById('z8-y');
    function updateZ8() {
        const v = parseFloat(z8vS.value);
        const y_mm = parseFloat(z8yS.value);
        const mu = 4.491; 
        const A = 0.054978;
        const F = mu * (v / (y_mm/1000)) * A;
        const P = F * v;
        document.getElementById('z8-v-v').innerText = v.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z8-v-y').innerText = y_mm.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z8-res-f').innerText = F.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z8-res-p').innerText = P.toFixed(1);
        z8ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,250);
        const cx = 200, cy = 125, rV = 60, rL = 60 + y_mm * 100;
        z8ctx.strokeStyle = "#1e293b"; z8ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        z8ctx.beginPath(); z8ctx.arc(cx, cy, rL+5, 0, Math.PI*2); z8ctx.stroke();
        const grd = z8ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, rV, cx, cy, rL);
        grd.addColorStop(0, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8)");
        grd.addColorStop(1, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)");
        z8ctx.fillStyle = grd;
        z8ctx.beginPath(); z8ctx.arc(cx, cy, rL, 0, Math.PI*2); z8ctx.fill();
        z8ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        z8ctx.beginPath(); z8ctx.arc(cx, cy, rV, 0, Math.PI*2); z8ctx.fill();
        z8ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; z8ctx.lineWidth = 2; z8ctx.stroke();
        z8ctx.save();
        z8ctx.translate(cx, cy);
        z8ctx.rotate(Date.now() * 0.002 * v);
        z8ctx.fillStyle = "white"; z8ctx.fillRect(rV-10, -2, 10, 4);
        z8ctx.restore();
        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ8);
    }
    [z8vS, z8yS].forEach(s => s.oninput = updateZ8); updateZ8();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### Zadatak Z9 — Utjecaj temperature na silu pomicanja klipa {.unnumbered}

Klip promjera $70 \, \text{mm}$ giba se unutar cilindra promjera $70{,}1 \, \text{mm}$. Potrebno je odrediti postotak smanjenja sile potrebne za pomicanje klipa kada se ulje zagrije sa temperature $0^\circ\text{C}$ na temperaturu $120^\circ\text{C}$. Dinamička viskoznost ulja pri $0^\circ\text{C}$ iznosi $0{,}0182 \, \text{Pa}\cdot\text{s}$, odnosno $0{,}00206 \, \text{Pa}\cdot\text{s}$ pri temperaturi $120^\circ\text{C}$.

**Zadano:** $D_k=0{,}07 \, \text{m}$, $D_c=0{,}0701 \, \text{m}$, $t_1=0^\circ\text{C}$, $t_2=120^\circ\text{C}$, $\mu_0=0{,}0182 \, \text{Pa}\cdot\text{s}$, $\mu_{120}=0{,}00206 \, \text{Pa}\cdot\text{s}$  
**Odrediti:** Postotak smanjenja sile $\frac{\Delta F_\tau}{F_{\tau 0}}$

**Rješenje:**

Iz jednadžbe za tangencijalno naprezanje: $F_\tau = \mu \cdot \frac{v}{y} \cdot A$. Budući da su brzina i geometrija konstantni, omjer sila odgovara omjeru viskoznosti:
$$\frac{F_{\tau 120}}{F_{\tau 0}} = \frac{\mu_{120}}{\mu_0} = \frac{0{,}00206}{0{,}0182} = 0{,}113187$$

Smanjenje sile:
$$\frac{\Delta F_{\tau}}{F_{\tau 0}} = 1 - \frac{F_{\tau 120}}{F_{\tau 0}} = 1 - 0{,}113187 = \mathbf{0{,}8868}$$

Tangencijalna sila smanjuje se zagrijavanjem ulja za $88{,}7\%$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

````{=html}
<div id="z9-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z9: Viskoznost vs Temperatura</h4>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 30px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <div style="background: white; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 350px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
            <div style="flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative;">
                <div id="z9-oil-box" style="width: 200px; height: 100px; border: 2px solid #475569; position: relative; background: #5c4033;">
                    <div id="z9-piston" style="position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 10px; width: 40px; height: 80px; background: #94a3b8; border: 2px solid #475569; transition: left 0.1s linear;"></div>
                    <canvas id="z9-molecules-canvas" width="200" height="100" style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;"></canvas>
                </div>
                <div id="z9-force-arrow" style="position: absolute; left: 40px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); white-space: nowrap;">
                    <div style="height: 4px; background: #ef4444; width: 50px; position: relative; transition: width 0.3s;">
                        <div style="position: absolute; right: -10px; top: -8px; width: 0; height: 0; border-top: 10px solid transparent; border-bottom: 10px solid transparent; border-left: 12px solid #ef4444;"></div>
                    </div>
                    <span style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444; position: absolute; top: -20px; left: 0;">Sila F</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style="height: 120px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 10px;">
                <canvas id="z9-graph-canvas" width="400" height="100" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Temperatura: <span id="z9-v-t">0</span> °C</label>
                <input type="range" id="z9-t-slider" min="0" max="120" step="1" value="0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ef4444;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #fdf2f8; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #fbcfe8;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #9d174d; margin-bottom: 8px;">ANALIZA VISKOZNOSTI:</div>
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #9d174d;">
                    <div>Din. viskoznost μ:</div><div style="font-weight: 800;"><span id="z9-res-mu">0.0182</span> Pa·s</div>
                    <div>Relativna sila F/F₀:</div><div style="font-weight: 800;"><span id="z9-res-f-rel">100</span> %</div>
                    <div>Smanjenje sile:</div><div style="font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444;"><span id="z9-res-red">0.0</span> %</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fizikalni-uvid">
    Viskoznost ulja eksponencijalno opada s temperaturom. Zagrijavanjem "razbijamo" molekularne lance, čime drastično smanjujemo otpor gibanju.
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const tS = document.getElementById('z9-t-slider');
    const piston = document.getElementById('z9-piston');
    const oilBox = document.getElementById('z9-oil-box');
    const forceArrow = document.getElementById('z9-force-arrow').firstElementChild;
    const molCanvas = document.getElementById('z9-molecules-canvas');
    const molCtx = molCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const graphCanvas = document.getElementById('z9-graph-canvas');
    const graphCtx = graphCanvas.getContext('2d');
    let pistonX = 10; let direction = 1;
    function update() {
        const T = parseFloat(tS.value);
        document.getElementById('z9-v-t').innerText = T;
        const mu0 = 0.0182; const mu120 = 0.00206;
        const k = Math.log(mu0 / mu120) / 120;
        const mu = mu0 * Math.exp(-k * T);
        const fRel = (mu / mu0) * 100;
        const reduction = 100 - fRel;
        document.getElementById('z9-res-mu').innerText = mu.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('z9-res-f-rel').innerText = fRel.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z9-res-red').innerText = reduction.toFixed(1);
        const tRatio = T / 120;
        const r = Math.floor(92 + tRatio * (252 - 92));
        const g = Math.floor(64 + tRatio * (211 - 64));
        const b = Math.floor(51 + tRatio * (77 - 51));
        oilBox.style.background = `rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`;
        forceArrow.style.width = (20 + (mu / mu0) * 80) + "px";
        drawMolecules(tRatio);
        drawGraph(T, k, mu0);
    }
    function drawMolecules(tRatio) {
        molCtx.clearRect(0,0,200,100); molCtx.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)"; molCtx.lineWidth = 1;
        const count = 20; const jitter = tRatio * 15;
        for(let i=0; i<count; i++) {
            let x = (i * 10) % 200; let y = (Math.floor(i/2) * 20) % 100;
            molCtx.beginPath(); molCtx.moveTo(x + Math.random()*jitter, y + Math.random()*jitter);
            if(tRatio < 0.5) { molCtx.lineTo(x + 15 + Math.random()*jitter, y + 5 + Math.random()*jitter); }
            else { molCtx.arc(x, y, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); }
            molCtx.stroke();
        }
    }
    function drawGraph(currT, k, mu0) {
        graphCtx.clearRect(0,0,400,100); graphCtx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; graphCtx.lineWidth = 1;
        graphCtx.beginPath(); graphCtx.moveTo(30, 10); graphCtx.lineTo(30, 90); graphCtx.lineTo(380, 90); graphCtx.stroke();
        graphCtx.strokeStyle = "#ec4899"; graphCtx.lineWidth = 2;
        graphCtx.beginPath();
        for(let t=0; t<=120; t++) {
            const m = mu0 * Math.exp(-k * t);
            const gx = 30 + (t / 120) * 340; const gy = 90 - (m / mu0) * 70;
            if(t===0) graphCtx.moveTo(gx, gy); else graphCtx.lineTo(gx, gy);
        }
        graphCtx.stroke();
        const px = 30 + (currT / 120) * 340; const py = 90 - (mu0 * Math.exp(-k * currT) / mu0) * 70;
        graphCtx.fillStyle = "#ef4444"; graphCtx.beginPath(); graphCtx.arc(px, py, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); graphCtx.fill();
    }
    function animatePiston() {
        pistonX += direction * 2; if(pistonX > 140 || pistonX < 10) direction *= -1;
        piston.style.left = pistonX + "px"; requestAnimationFrame(animatePiston);
    }
    tS.oninput = update; update(); animatePiston();
})();
</script>
````
